message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 20
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant "AGVServer" as AGVS
participant "AGVServerThread" as AGVST
participant "AVGManagerController" as AMGC
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as DTServer
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as DTThread
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as DTController
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as Codec

PM -> UI : Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV

UI -> AGVS : message
activate AGVS
AGVS -> UI : accept
AGVS -> AGVST : start
activate AGVST

AGVST -> Codec : Decoding(r)
activate Codec
Codec -> AGVST : Message
AGVST -> AMGC : FifoAGV()
activate AMGC
AMGC -> AMGC : findavailableOrder()
deactivate AMGC

loop until orderList is empty
  AMGC -> AMGC : findavailableAGV(weight,volume)
  AMGC -> AMGC : createTaskandSave(description,order,agv)
  AMGC -> AMGC : doTask()
  AMGC -> DTServer : message
  activate DTServer
  DTServer -> AMGC : accept
  DTServer -> DTThread : start
  activate DTThread

  DTThread -> Codec : Decoding(r)
  Codec -> DTThread : message
  DTThread -> DTController : doTask(taskPerform)
  activate DTController
  DTController -> DTThread : TaskReportMessage
  deactivate DTController

  DTThread -> DTServer : TaskReportMessage
  deactivate DTThread
  DTServer -> AMGC : TaskReportMessage
  deactivate DTServer

  AMGC -> AGVST : TaskReportMessage
end

AGVST -> AGVS : ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVST
AGVS -> UI : ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVS
UI -> PM : Informs operation success
@enduml
